description: Revise SOP-PM-HEPA-001 to set Grade A/B HEPA replacement interval to 12 months when trend signals deterioration.
Add automated reminders and QA escalation for HEPA replacement deadlines within the maintenance planner.
Revise material transfer documentation SOP to define real-time recording and second-person verification ownership.
Strengthen visual inspection reconciliation review and escalation criteria for repeated borderline observations.
Add weekly review of autoclave printout completeness to sterile preparation shift huddle.
